devotionals.title: Rooted, Not Rushed
devotionals.body: What it means to grow at God's pace instead of the world's — and why that's actually good news.

devotionals.title: The Gift of Showing Up
devotionals.body: A short reflection on faithfulness in the ordinary, unremarkable moments of the week.

devotionals.title: Rest Before Rush
devotionals.body: Why Sabbath still matters, even when your calendar says it doesn't have room for it.
